inputs.label: Voltage (V)
inputs.businessContext: Nominal line-to-line voltage from motor nameplate, typically 400 V for three-phase industrial motors.

businessContext_i18n.en: Nominal line-to-line voltage from motor nameplate, typically 400 V for three-phase industrial motors.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Motor etiketinden anma hatlar arası gerilim, tipik olarak üç fazlı endüstriyel motorlar için 400 V.

inputs.label: Efficiency (decimal)
inputs.businessContext: Motor efficiency as a decimal fraction, e.g., 0.9 for 90% per ISO 1217 or manufacturer data.

businessContext_i18n.en: Motor efficiency as a decimal fraction, e.g., 0.9 for 90% per ISO 1217 or manufacturer data.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Motor verimi, ondalık kesir olarak, örn. ISO 1217 veya üretici verilerine göre %90 için 0,9.

inputs.label: Power Factor (decimal)
inputs.businessContext: Motor power factor under full load, typically 0.8–0.9 for induction motors.

businessContext_i18n.en: Motor power factor under full load, typically 0.8–0.9 for induction motors.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tam yükte motor güç faktörü, asenkron motorlar için tipik olarak 0,8–0,9.

inputs.label: Phase Factor
inputs.businessContext: 1.0 for single-phase, √3 ≈ 1.732 for balanced three-phase. Default reflects common three-phase industrial supply.

businessContext_i18n.en: 1.0 for single-phase, √3 ≈ 1.732 for balanced three-phase. Default reflects common three-phase industrial supply.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek faz için 1,0, dengeli üç faz için √3 ≈ 1,732. Varsayılan, yaygın endüstriyel üç fazlı beslemeyi yansıtır.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
